TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Gluban = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang gluban. 146 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 501 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 469 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 32 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq82%, Tayal8%, Bunun1%, Paiwan1%, ni rahuq na o1%. Pusu nniqan alang Pusu klegan seejiq mniq alang Gluban o Seejiq Tgdaya, tnganan naq seejiq nealang o Alang Gluban . Nniqan alang Nyusan Nan-two nsgan Jen-ay alang Hu-cu. Knlbangan Gaga gqiyan hidaw nyusan Nan-two nsgan Jen-ay ka alang Gluban, hraan hidaw o dalih alang Cung-yuan, alang Mey-yuan ni Hwey-swun rin-cang, gqiyan hidaw o lutuc nsgan Kwo-sin na Mey-rin se-cyu, hunac hraan hidaw o niqan yayung Pey-kang ka ttqiri ssiyaw, gqiyan hidaw o niqan yayung Mey-yuan, daya o niqan gggiyaq Mey-yuan, emburux balay ka alang hini. Ti-ri lnglingay Sttu. Pgkla patas cyaw-tung Kndadax Er-kaw na lutuc Cung-two kung-ru cyaw-ryo-taw(caw-tung)>127syeyn ca-taw(hunac)Nan-two>Cung-two tbiyax na elug rulu>Fen-caw ru ca-taw>Fen-caw ru>Bwo-ay ru>Tung-san ru>Cung-cng ru>Cung-tan kung-ru>Kwo-sin ru>Cang-pey ru>Cung-hwa ru>alang Gluban. Pusu klegan seejiq nealang Seejiq. Djiyun kari Kari Seejiq ni Tlu. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Muda Gaya. Pnyahan alang Alang:Kari Seejiq, dungus na kari Seejiq o alang msa. Gluban:Tmhangan seejiq tnpusu ka alang Gluban nii. Gluban, seejiq Nihung o tmhangan dha Cwan-cung-taw(Kawa NaKahara Jima), yasa niqan dha yayung(yayung Pey-kang ni yayung Mey-yuan), ga ska tay-ti o niqan yayung ciway mnuda sun dha A-pi-s yaung ka seejiq nalang, yasa niqan tru yayung ka tqiri ssiyaw alang, kiya ka mnrmuxan Tanah Tunux siida o tmhangan dha"Tay-cung cow Cung-taw se ", tmhangan ita naq Seejiq o Gluban msa, dungus na kari nii o sngayan na nniqun. Pusu klegan seejiq mniq alang Gluban o Seejiq Tgdaya. Seuxal han o pusu bi ga eniq Paran, dhuq saw hngkwasan 1930 idas 10 jiyax 27 siida, yaasa ini baka biyax kmlawa Tanah Tunux, kika maa tnjiyal seejiq tnpusu mniq Paran, kika klaun dha balang kana seejiq knlangan "Jyoji Paran".Hngkwasan 1931 idas 5 jiyax 6 sngari na seejiq o muri dha seejiq Nihung tnhjilan hini nniqun ka Seejiq, mniq saw mnrmuxan seejiq Nihung siida pnhyugan Cwan-cung-taw se, mniyah ka seyhu Kwo-min do klka priyux alang Gluban, tnganan naq seejiq nealang o Alang Gluban . Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Pusu pnhyugan ◎Sapah Keysacu na Gluban (049)2941076 Nyusan Nan-to nsgan Jen-ay alang Hu-cu Min-yuey syang 50 haw. Saan rmigaw ◎Alang Gliban Seejiq tnpusu na Yi-su cun Nyusan Nan-to nsgan Jen-ay alang Gluban na qpruhan Se-cyu fa-cang syey-hwey o iyux pnqtaan kana saw babaw dxgal sayang, kiya ni mtutuy kana alang Gluban Yi-su cun ksun ka lnglungan dha, dmurun dha balay tduwa pseupu kana neuda nseejiq na tminun, Bi-tiyaw, cwan-cu, qmqur qqhuni ka pnrjingan dha, uxay uri o tuhuy saw lukus Seejiq sbiyaw, uuqun sbiyaw, saan tqiyan sapah, ttgsa kari Seejiq, mgrig grig ni mhrapas qsiya yayung, emphuma pnegalang, kndusan, muduh siyang, BBQ dnii uuda, pgkla kana saw seejiq bukuy mnruxan Tanah Tunux siida ka hncian lutuc laqi laqi, gashuya pstutuy ka dhyaan.
S.PHON: = gluban = gaga mniq nantowsən ɟnajsjaŋ ka alaŋ gluban. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, səəɟiq/səədiq/səəɟiq/səəɟiq/sədiq**%, tajal*%, bunun*%, paiwan*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%. pusu nniqan alaŋ pusu kləgan səəɟiq mniq alaŋ gluban o səəɟiq tgdaja, tŋanan naq səəɟiq nəalaŋ o alaŋ gluban . nniqan alaŋ njusan nan-two nsgan ɟən-aj alaŋ ħu-ʦu. knlbaŋan gaga gqijan ħidaw njusan nan-two nsgan ɟən-aj ka alaŋ gluban, ħɾaan ħidaw o daliħ alaŋ ʦuŋ-juan, alaŋ mə-juan ni ħwə-swun ɾin-ʦaŋ, gqijan ħidaw o lutuʦ nsgan kwo-sin na mə-ɾin sə-ʦju, ħunaʦ ħɾaan ħidaw o niqan jajuŋ pə-kaŋ ka ttqiɾi ssijaw, gqijan ħidaw o niqan jajuŋ mə-juan, daja o niqan gggijaq mə-juan, əmbuɾux balaj ka alaŋ ħini. ti-ɾi lŋliŋaj sttu. pgkla patas ʦjaw-tuŋ kndadax əɾ-kaw na lutuʦ ʦuŋ-two kuŋ-ɾu ʦjaw-ɾjo-taw(ʦaw-tuŋ)>***sjən ʦa-taw(ħunaʦ)nan-two>ʦuŋ-two tbijax na əlug ɾulu>*ən-ʦaw ɾu ʦa-taw>*ən-ʦaw ɾu>bwo-aj ɾu>tuŋ-san ɾu>ʦuŋ-ʦŋ ɾu>ʦuŋ-tan kuŋ-ɾu>kwo-sin ɾu>ʦaŋ-pə ɾu>ʦuŋ-ħwa ɾu>alaŋ gluban. pusu kləgan səəɟiq nəalaŋ səəɟiq. dɟijun kaɾi kaɾi səəɟiq ni tlu. snħijan ʦuŋ-ʦjaw muda gaja. pnjaħan alaŋ alaŋ:kaɾi səəɟiq, duŋus na kaɾi səəɟiq o alaŋ msa. gluban:tmħaŋan səəɟiq tnpusu ka alaŋ gluban nii. gluban, səəɟiq niħuŋ o tmħaŋan dħa ʦwan-ʦuŋ-taw(kawa nakaħaɾa ɟima), jasa niqan dħa jajuŋ(jajuŋ pə-kaŋ ni jajuŋ mə-juan), ga ska taj-ti o niqan jajuŋ ʦiwaj mnuda sun dħa a-pi-s jauŋ ka səəɟiq nalaŋ, jasa niqan tɾu jajuŋ ka tqiɾi ssijaw alaŋ, kija ka mnɾmuxan tanaħ tunux siida o tmħaŋan dħa"taj-ʦuŋ ʦow ʦuŋ-taw sə ", tmħaŋan ita naq səəɟiq o gluban msa, duŋus na kaɾi nii o sŋajan na nniqun. pusu kləgan səəɟiq mniq alaŋ gluban o səəɟiq tgdaja. səuxal ħan o pusu bi ga əniq paɾan, dħuq saw ħŋkwasan **** idas ** ɟijax ** siida, jaasa ini baka bijax kmlawa tanaħ tunux, kika maa tnɟijal səəɟiq tnpusu mniq paɾan, kika klaun dħa balaŋ kana səəɟiq knlaŋan "ɟjoɟi paɾan".ħŋkwasan **** idas * ɟijax * sŋaɾi na səəɟiq o muɾi dħa səəɟiq niħuŋ tnħɟilan ħini nniqun ka səəɟiq, mniq saw mnɾmuxan səəɟiq niħuŋ siida pnħjugan ʦwan-ʦuŋ-taw sə, mnijaħ ka səħu kwo-min do klka pɾijux alaŋ gluban, tŋanan naq səəɟiq nəalaŋ o alaŋ gluban . pgkla patas saan ɾmigaw pusu pnħjugan *sapaħ kəsaʦu na gluban (***)******* njusan nan-to nsgan ɟən-aj alaŋ ħu-ʦu min-juə sjaŋ ** ħaw. saan ɾmigaw *alaŋ gliban səəɟiq tnpusu na ji-su ʦun njusan nan-to nsgan ɟən-aj alaŋ gluban na qpɾuħan sə-ʦju *a-ʦaŋ sjə-ħwə o ijux pnqtaan kana saw babaw dxgal sajaŋ, kija ni mtutuj kana alaŋ gluban ji-su ʦun ksun ka lŋluŋan dħa, dmuɾun dħa balaj tduwa psəupu kana nəuda nsəəɟiq na tminun, bi-tijaw, ʦwan-ʦu, qmquɾ qqħuni ka pnɾɟiŋan dħa, uxaj uɾi o tuħuj saw lukus səəɟiq sbijaw, uuqun sbijaw, saan tqijan sapaħ, ttgsa kaɾi səəɟiq, mgɾig gɾig ni mħɾapas qsija jajuŋ, əmpħuma pnəgalaŋ, kndusan, muduħ sijaŋ, bbq dnii uuda, pgkla kana saw səəɟiq bukuj mnɾuxan tanaħ tunux siida ka ħnʦian lutuʦ laqi laqi, gasħuja pstutuj ka dħjaan.
S.FORM: = Gluban = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang gluban. 146 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 501 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 469 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 32 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq82%, Tayal8%, Bunun1%, Paiwan1%, ni rahuq na o1%. Pusu nniqan alang Pusu klegan seejiq mniq alang Gluban o Seejiq Tgdaya, tnganan naq seejiq nealang o Alang Gluban . Nniqan alang Nyusan Nan-two nsgan Jen-ay alang Hu-cu. Knlbangan Gaga gqiyan hidaw nyusan Nan-two nsgan Jen-ay ka alang Gluban, hraan hidaw o dalih alang Cung-yuan, alang Mey-yuan ni Hwey-swun rin-cang, gqiyan hidaw o lutuc nsgan Kwo-sin na Mey-rin se-cyu, hunac hraan hidaw o niqan yayung Pey-kang ka ttqiri ssiyaw, gqiyan hidaw o niqan yayung Mey-yuan, daya o niqan gggiyaq Mey-yuan, emburux balay ka alang hini. Ti-ri lnglingay Sttu. Pgkla patas cyaw-tung Kndadax Er-kaw na lutuc Cung-two kung-ru cyaw-ryo-taw(caw-tung)>127syeyn ca-taw(hunac)Nan-two>Cung-two tbiyax na elug rulu>Fen-caw ru ca-taw>Fen-caw ru>Bwo-ay ru>Tung-san ru>Cung-cng ru>Cung-tan kung-ru>Kwo-sin ru>Cang-pey ru>Cung-hwa ru>alang Gluban. Pusu klegan seejiq nealang Seejiq. Djiyun kari Kari Seejiq ni Tlu. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Muda Gaya. Pnyahan alang Alang:Kari Seejiq, dungus na kari Seejiq o alang msa. Gluban:Tmhangan seejiq tnpusu ka alang Gluban nii. Gluban, seejiq Nihung o tmhangan dha Cwan-cung-taw(Kawa NaKahara Jima), yasa niqan dha yayung(yayung Pey-kang ni yayung Mey-yuan), ga ska tay-ti o niqan yayung ciway mnuda sun dha A-pi-s yaung ka seejiq nalang, yasa niqan tru yayung ka tqiri ssiyaw alang, kiya ka mnrmuxan Tanah Tunux siida o tmhangan dha"Tay-cung cow Cung-taw se ", tmhangan ita naq Seejiq o Gluban msa, dungus na kari nii o sngayan na nniqun. Pusu klegan seejiq mniq alang Gluban o Seejiq Tgdaya. Seuxal han o pusu bi ga eniq Paran, dhuq saw hngkwasan 1930 idas 10 jiyax 27 siida, yaasa ini baka biyax kmlawa Tanah Tunux, kika maa tnjiyal seejiq tnpusu mniq Paran, kika klaun dha balang kana seejiq knlangan "Jyoji Paran".Hngkwasan 1931 idas 5 jiyax 6 sngari na seejiq o muri dha seejiq Nihung tnhjilan hini nniqun ka Seejiq, mniq saw mnrmuxan seejiq Nihung siida pnhyugan Cwan-cung-taw se, mniyah ka seyhu Kwo-min do klka priyux alang Gluban, tnganan naq seejiq nealang o Alang Gluban . Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Pusu pnhyugan ◎Sapah Keysacu na Gluban (049)2941076 Nyusan Nan-to nsgan Jen-ay alang Hu-cu Min-yuey syang 50 haw. Saan rmigaw ◎Alang Gliban Seejiq tnpusu na Yi-su cun Nyusan Nan-to nsgan Jen-ay alang Gluban na qpruhan Se-cyu fa-cang syey-hwey o iyux pnqtaan kana saw babaw dxgal sayang, kiya ni mtutuy kana alang Gluban Yi-su cun ksun ka lnglungan dha, dmurun dha balay tduwa pseupu kana neuda nseejiq na tminun, Bi-tiyaw, cwan-cu, qmqur qqhuni ka pnrjingan dha, uxay uri o tuhuy saw lukus Seejiq sbiyaw, uuqun sbiyaw, saan tqiyan sapah, ttgsa kari Seejiq, mgrig grig ni mhrapas qsiya yayung, emphuma pnegalang, kndusan, muduh siyang, BBQ dnii uuda, pgkla kana saw seejiq bukuy mnruxan Tanah Tunux siida ka hncian lutuc laqi laqi, gashuya pstutuy ka dhyaan.
S.PHON: = gluban = gaga mniq nantowsən ɟnajsjaŋ ka alaŋ gluban. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, səəɟiq/səədiq/səəɟiq/səəɟiq/sədiq**%, tajal*%, bunun*%, paiwan*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%. pusu nniqan alaŋ pusu kləgan səəɟiq mniq alaŋ gluban o səəɟiq tgdaja, tŋanan naq səəɟiq nəalaŋ o alaŋ gluban . nniqan alaŋ njusan nan-two nsgan ɟən-aj alaŋ ħu-ʦu. knlbaŋan gaga gqijan ħidaw njusan nan-two nsgan ɟən-aj ka alaŋ gluban, ħɾaan ħidaw o daliħ alaŋ ʦuŋ-juan, alaŋ mə-juan ni ħwə-swun ɾin-ʦaŋ, gqijan ħidaw o lutuʦ nsgan kwo-sin na mə-ɾin sə-ʦju, ħunaʦ ħɾaan ħidaw o niqan jajuŋ pə-kaŋ ka ttqiɾi ssijaw, gqijan ħidaw o niqan jajuŋ mə-juan, daja o niqan gggijaq mə-juan, əmbuɾux balaj ka alaŋ ħini. ti-ɾi lŋliŋaj sttu. pgkla patas ʦjaw-tuŋ kndadax əɾ-kaw na lutuʦ ʦuŋ-two kuŋ-ɾu ʦjaw-ɾjo-taw(ʦaw-tuŋ)>***sjən ʦa-taw(ħunaʦ)nan-two>ʦuŋ-two tbijax na əlug ɾulu>*ən-ʦaw ɾu ʦa-taw>*ən-ʦaw ɾu>bwo-aj ɾu>tuŋ-san ɾu>ʦuŋ-ʦŋ ɾu>ʦuŋ-tan kuŋ-ɾu>kwo-sin ɾu>ʦaŋ-pə ɾu>ʦuŋ-ħwa ɾu>alaŋ gluban. pusu kləgan səəɟiq nəalaŋ səəɟiq. dɟijun kaɾi kaɾi səəɟiq ni tlu. snħijan ʦuŋ-ʦjaw muda gaja. pnjaħan alaŋ alaŋ:kaɾi səəɟiq, duŋus na kaɾi səəɟiq o alaŋ msa. gluban:tmħaŋan səəɟiq tnpusu ka alaŋ gluban nii. gluban, səəɟiq niħuŋ o tmħaŋan dħa ʦwan-ʦuŋ-taw(kawa nakaħaɾa ɟima), jasa niqan dħa jajuŋ(jajuŋ pə-kaŋ ni jajuŋ mə-juan), ga ska taj-ti o niqan jajuŋ ʦiwaj mnuda sun dħa a-pi-s jauŋ ka səəɟiq nalaŋ, jasa niqan tɾu jajuŋ ka tqiɾi ssijaw alaŋ, kija ka mnɾmuxan tanaħ tunux siida o tmħaŋan dħa"taj-ʦuŋ ʦow ʦuŋ-taw sə ", tmħaŋan ita naq səəɟiq o gluban msa, duŋus na kaɾi nii o sŋajan na nniqun. pusu kləgan səəɟiq mniq alaŋ gluban o səəɟiq tgdaja. səuxal ħan o pusu bi ga əniq paɾan, dħuq saw ħŋkwasan **** idas ** ɟijax ** siida, jaasa ini baka bijax kmlawa tanaħ tunux, kika maa tnɟijal səəɟiq tnpusu mniq paɾan, kika klaun dħa balaŋ kana səəɟiq knlaŋan "ɟjoɟi paɾan".ħŋkwasan **** idas * ɟijax * sŋaɾi na səəɟiq o muɾi dħa səəɟiq niħuŋ tnħɟilan ħini nniqun ka səəɟiq, mniq saw mnɾmuxan səəɟiq niħuŋ siida pnħjugan ʦwan-ʦuŋ-taw sə, mnijaħ ka səħu kwo-min do klka pɾijux alaŋ gluban, tŋanan naq səəɟiq nəalaŋ o alaŋ gluban . pgkla patas saan ɾmigaw pusu pnħjugan *sapaħ kəsaʦu na gluban (***)******* njusan nan-to nsgan ɟən-aj alaŋ ħu-ʦu min-juə sjaŋ ** ħaw. saan ɾmigaw *alaŋ gliban səəɟiq tnpusu na ji-su ʦun njusan nan-to nsgan ɟən-aj alaŋ gluban na qpɾuħan sə-ʦju *a-ʦaŋ sjə-ħwə o ijux pnqtaan kana saw babaw dxgal sajaŋ, kija ni mtutuj kana alaŋ gluban ji-su ʦun ksun ka lŋluŋan dħa, dmuɾun dħa balaj tduwa psəupu kana nəuda nsəəɟiq na tminun, bi-tijaw, ʦwan-ʦu, qmquɾ qqħuni ka pnɾɟiŋan dħa, uxaj uɾi o tuħuj saw lukus səəɟiq sbijaw, uuqun sbijaw, saan tqijan sapaħ, ttgsa kaɾi səəɟiq, mgɾig gɾig ni mħɾapas qsija jajuŋ, əmpħuma pnəgalaŋ, kndusan, muduħ sijaŋ, bbq dnii uuda, pgkla kana saw səəɟiq bukuj mnɾuxan tanaħ tunux siida ka ħnʦian lutuʦ laqi laqi, gasħuja pstutuj ka dħjaan.
